textByHashes.85441da37541e9c6d567125b385836c62959b119: I'm not going to let you plunder my Master's tomb you know.
textByHashes.9248f353e35a7f227ac7ee0586ad6ae34e921d5c: If it will keep you out of mischief I suppose I could set something up for you...
textByHashes.5174fa37b7e3f86c468b2f7b146d518274f72951: I have a few rooms full of some things you humans might consider valuable, do you want to give it a go?
textByHashes.8b5919717ee9e42e8d96bc412719a29058160751: You have five minutes to explore the treasure rooms and collect as many artefacts as you can.
textByHashes.3cd65531875d77e2b06652f515e61780f5661e20: The artefacts are in the urns, chests and sarcophagi found in each room.
textByHashes.ac816afab748cdc39c5544065da5ba7ba3899961: There are eight treasure rooms, each subsequent room requires higher thieving skills to both enter the room and thieve from the urns and other containers.
textByHashes.3a479e90edf7ade6e86f47b4d4e2243b5811b769: The rewards also become more lucrative the further into the tomb you go.
textByHashes.2315f96b3bff972fbd60a4b3633944cbe5a22c4f: You will also have to deactivate a trap in order to enter the main part of each room.
textByHashes.62097971fbb67b82708243aec5a379a13ed76074: When you want to move onto the next room you need to find the correct door first.
textByHashes.d7dfc8a9a3c46849c2dfc8f3030893e9f991a26b: There are four possible exits, you must open the door before finding out whether it is the exit or not.
textByHashes.78d7b7ae248d5ab4b54e9f9d38cb5f099e905287: Opening the doors require picking their locks. Having a lockpick will make this easier.
textByHashes.dda9bbee2da0b88e36f0724d5ce5f48aa337f131: If at any point you decide you need to leave just use a glowing door.
textByHashes.79792f29a2a9b3f03fb17fdb29a39242138a852e: The game will end and you will be taken out of the pyramid.
textByHashes.0e5418c841b1faeff93417fa10e2aa6358c8b6d1: The artefacts are in the urns, chests and sarcophagi.
textByHashes.57d5e88e3411e8efff19adf879c974d19ea1a3c6: Urns contain snakes that guard them.
textByHashes.53f08835101c54b41e2dcb8d2895db583fbda5b0: The sarcophagi take some strength to open. They take a while to open.
textByHashes.2e338b1c78f4864c1f4a196322f22d77250ad182: Of course, Mummies have been known to take a nap in the sarcophagi, so beware.
textByHashes.04d9c0250af89808907d0434ce8f71e757c33fe0: The golden chests generally contain better artefacts, but are also trapped with scarabs!
textByHashes.9bb07ca0efd91b299a53d32368313bbca785392e: There are a number of different artefacts, of three main types. The least valuable are the pottery statuettes and scarabs, and the ivory combs.
textByHashes.f07d7c515e0b3ccd1987c9d7754d1efa37df0d6d: Next are the stone scarabs, statuettes and seals, and finally the gold versions of those artefacts.
textByHashes.0957aade56cd35b4a3524c9f548029a0503a7809: They are not old, but are well made.
textByHashes.66fbc31e2cb039ccb14ab77b8a2e0341318897fb: That Simon Simpleton, I mean Templeton, will probably give you some money for them.
textByHashes.2318c79e6ac89c95fea41f1ae671decf3a8559b9: He couldn't spot a real artefact if it came up to him and bit him in the face.
textByHashes.17659ef633ba0e141de8e311f94fc66438bcc55f: He usually slinks about near the pyramid north-east of Sophanem. I expect he's trying to get some poor fools to steal things from that pyramid as well.
textByHashes.5f2d625ef24e477ad13bd5433897cfad26b9f6e7: I expect he'll give you more gold for some than others.
textByHashes.f5803fed01b31433effb3cab7e37ec40a4df29cb: Where did you hear about that?
textByHashes.9efb49be68496ca26a459d6aa6cdef1ec9c27654: It's the only genuinely valuable artefact in this place.
textByHashes.efc80a445dab64ee9dfe78137d0b478b87e1b34e: It links all the great pyramids in the area, and can be used to travel between them.
textByHashes.bb4597bce36c9409ca6af9d859b5b9d1a98b623b: It requires charging with offerings of fine craftsmanship, that's why we have so many spare artefacts lying around.
textByHashes.7fcec066e011a0106d9f01f44b02276767744cb8: Anyway, I won't let you get your grubby little hands on the sceptre.
textByHashes.27dcc0e356fc21fd7fca5486a315d796f537dcb1: Well, get out of here then.
textByHashes.1a130f81174b9c2af35f089c1638c7ec5a5f068e: Fine, I'll take you to the first room now...
textByHashes.f29d685f915648894d9031bf6274e53a0a53d89e: You shouldn't have that thing in the first place, thief!
textByHashes.c5c389c559add685f4a11899589dfee1c8e9fd64: No! Why would I waste the King's magic when it's already fully charged?
textByHashes.da8aec89183c97e222b885cf1d4b26b4e2c0883f: [sigh] Oh alright, but this is such a waste of the King's magic...
textByHashes.0bb90d8af8c8ab016b082d5d83b2cf758afc8eb4: You need to have 6 gold artefacts to recharge your sceptre.
textByHashes.60b17fc0a6e1d581263d591dd633d49bae244fd7: Right, you already had charges, and I don't give discounts. That means 6 artefacts gives you charges. Now be on your way.
textByHashes.0f19612f269c1ff25b17702a2f20739d73d1c38d: Right, 6 artefacts gives you charges. Now be on your way.
textByHashes.87b2a7b514f6446970e74ea79344a3d127333747: You need to have 12 stone artefacts to recharge your sceptre.
textByHashes.c968a6e2c2d07d19d2b5530f9225cde9eb954d2a: Right, you already had charges, and I don't give discounts. That means 12 artefacts gives you charges. Now be on your way.
textByHashes.841274ac2d08738853d5700bb79e4dce1f27da1c: Right, 12 artefacts gives you charges. Now be on your way.
textByHashes.376f5bff82ab1662ce92e27de455362523f721a3: You need to have 24 pottery or ivory artefacts to recharge your sceptre.
textByHashes.901ce3a1b2cb110418da219151de9af7c9de4c40: Right, you already had charges, and I don't give discounts. That means 24 artefacts gives you charges. Now be on your way.
textByHashes.c311773118eabd020ce1101ca77f0a97718153ba: Right, 24 artefacts gives you charges. Now be on your way.
textByHashes.d96b66b18f8b9d671a0c024ab50f19034eccb66a: You've had your five minutes of plundering. Now be off with you!
textByHashes.9787fdd1b4e02739998f5cbcef1aa245a1eb55ce: Right, you already had charges, and I don't give discounts. That means 6 artefacts gives you charges. Now be on your way.
textByHashes.9e1a9baf979eb73b7197815d4fb6c040f33b4c6e: Right, 6 artefacts gives you charges. Now be on your way.
textByHashes.da16f45dedb15fe047b6d8f9d7a72f652bd40a9f: You have found my Master's Sceptre - You have been here long enough. Begone.
textByHashes.63e33dfdfab0ec98193f87a699193f41b9e3a197: You're not done yet! Do this for me!
textByHashes.9881e2ba8c23684da9fcb70133703cd5d22b7f6a: Scarabs can do puzzles better than that!
